subcodes.first_line: O letter Há! Hearken thou unto the Call of the Wronged One. Verily, there is none other God but Him, the All-Forgiving, the Most Bountiful. That which was hidden hath been made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حاء ان استمع ندآء المظلوم انه لا اله الا هو الغفور الکریم قد ظهر ما
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @firmness in the Covenant
